image_prompt: SVG: front-view illustration of a flying fox (macro-bat) with wings outstretched, brown fur, leathery wing membranes with visible finger bones.

SVG: food web with producers (palm tree, eucalyptus, mango tree, grass) at the bottom, primary consumers (wood grub, moth larva, mouse) in the middle, flying fox centre, predators (wedge-tailed eagle top, carpet snake) at the top; arrows from prey to predator.
SVG: cell-division flowcharts side-by-side. Mitosis: parent cell → DNA replicates → 2 daughter cells. Meiosis: parent cell → DNA replicates → 2 daughter cells → 4 daughter cells.

SVG: Venn diagram with green Mitosis circle (left, labelled 'Two daughter cells') overlapping orange Meiosis circle (right, labelled 'Four daughter cells'), central 'Both' region, plus a column of draggable characteristic chips on the right.
SVG: cyclic flow diagram around a central human silhouette showing the negative-feedback loop — body temperature rises/falls, body systems interact, returns to normal (36.5–37.5°C).

topic: Four cell-type images (animal, plant, bacterium, DNA)
image_prompt: SVG: four labelled images A–D — A: animal cell (round, orange, with nucleus and organelles), B: plant cell (rectangular with cell wall and chloroplasts), C: rod-shaped bacterium with flagellum (the prokaryote), D: DNA double helix.

SVG: identification chart showing colony Form silhouettes (Circular, Irregular, Filamentous, Rhizoid) and View-from-the-side profiles (Raised, Convex, Flat, Umbonate, Crateriform), alongside a species table (A–D, Colour, Form, View) and a circled example colony to identify.
SVG: data table with Liquid (bleach, ethanol, hydrogen peroxide, iodine, water), Plate 1 diameter of zone of no growth filled (22, 9, 27, 17, 0 mm), Plate 2 column blank for the student to complete.

topic: Two agar plates with disinfectant disks + ruler
image_prompt: SVG: two Petri dishes side-by-side on a dark background. Plate 1 has labelled zones of no growth around bleach (22 mm), hydrogen peroxide (27 mm), iodine (17 mm), ethanol (9 mm), water (0 mm). Plate 2 shows the same disinfectants with unlabelled zones (bleach 24, hydrogen peroxide 13, iodine 15, ethanol 7, water 0 mm) for the student to measure with the included ruler.

SVG: 5-panel evolution diagram. Stage 1: mixed bacterial population (mostly sensitive/yellow, few resistant/purple). Stage 2: antibiotic added, sensitive bacteria dying (greyed out), resistant survive. Stage 3: only resistant individuals remain. Stage 4: new resistant population thrives. Stage 5: antibiotic added but all bacteria are resistant — dense population unaffected. Dashed empty caption boxes under stages 2 and 5.

SVG: scatter plot, Percentage of resistant bacteria / % (y, 2.0-10.0) vs Year (x, 1999-2014); E. coli resistance dips to ~3% around 2006-2007 then rises to 8.9% by 2014; cross markers at all table values.

SVG: Petri dish on dark background with five labelled antibiotic disks — Amoxicillin (tiny zone), Ampicillin (small zone), Gentamicin (moderate), Tetracycline (moderate) and Trimethoprim (largest clear zone of no growth). Leader line labels 'Zone of no growth' pointing to one disk.

SVG: lab apparatus — a light source emitting orange light waves through a test tube containing nutrient liquid, with a pipette adding bacteria, and a colorimeter on the right displaying 0% absorption on a yellow LCD.

SVG: bacterial population growth curve, Population of bacteria (y) vs Time (x), sigmoid S-curve with three shaded stage bands (Stage 1 lag, Stage 2 log/exponential, Stage 3 stationary plateau); no numeric scale (qualitative).
SVG: line graph, Percentage absorption (y) vs Population of bacteria (x), straight line through the origin showing a positive linear relationship; no numeric scale (qualitative).

SVG: two-panel medical interventions. Left: 4-step angioplasty showing cholesterol plaque → catheter with stent inserted → balloon inflated → balloon removed leaving expanded stent. Right: human silhouette with liver highlighted, enlarged liver view showing substance A → enzyme blocked by Statin → cholesterol.

SVG: three-panel infographic, top row — NOT SMOKING (orange header, ashtray with cigarettes), EATING HEALTHY FOODS (green header, cauliflower and lettuce), TAKING REGULAR EXERCISE (blue header, volleyball).

SVG: three-panel infographic, bottom row — MAINTAINING A HEALTHY WEIGHT (red header, feet on a digital scale), MONITORING BLOOD PRESSURE AND CHOLESTEROL (dark header, BP cuff/monitor and stethoscope), MINIMIZING STRESS (pink header, person seated cross-legged meditating).
